pwn.overflow.title: Overflow Payload
pwn.fmt.x64_note: Note: x64 addresses contain NULL bytes, addresses must be placed at the end of payload
pwn.fmt.tip: Tip: Actual payload needs offset adjustment based on stack layout
pwn.fmt.find_offset_send: Send the following payload to determine the offset
pwn.fmt.find_offset_look: Find 0x41414141 (AAAA) in the output to determine the offset.
pwn.fmt.find_offset_example: Example: if you see 0x41414141 at position 7, the offset is 7
pwn.shellcode.need_generate: (Need to generate based on target OS version)
pwn.shellcode.use_msfvenom: Use msfvenom: msfvenom -p windows/exec CMD=cmd -f python
pwn.addr.title: Address Convert
pwn.bad.title: Bad Chars Detection
pwn.bad.suggest: Suggestion: Use msfvenom -b option to exclude bad chars
pwn.bad.none_found: No common bad chars found (null-free, no newline/space)
pwn.heap.orange_desc: Modify top chunk to trigger sysmalloc

misc.core_values.title: Core Values Encoding Decode
misc.core_values.cannot_decode: Cannot decode, may need other encoding method
misc.pigpen.title: Pigpen Cipher
misc.pigpen.description: Pigpen cipher is a graphical cipher, requires manual decoding with reference table.
misc.qr.url_detected: URL detected, use Web module for further analysis
misc.qr.install_pyzbar: Install pyzbar for QR decode: pip install pyzbar
misc.qr.need_pyzbar: Need pyzbar: pip install pyzbar Pillow
misc.qr.need_qrcode_lib: Need qrcode library: pip install qrcode[pil]
misc.barcode.not_detected: No barcode or QR code detected
misc.jwt.invalid_format: Invalid JWT format (need 3 segments separated by .)
misc.jwt.title: JWT Decode
misc.jwt.hs256_tip2: Or try changing alg to none: jwt_forge_none <token>
misc.jwt.rs256_tip1: Try changing alg to none bypass: jwt_forge_none <token>
misc.jwt.rs256_tip2: Or try RS256->HS256 algorithm confusion attack (requires public key)
misc.jwt.none_tip: alg is already none - signature not verified, can directly tamper payload
misc.jwt.check_downgrade: Check if can downgrade to none algorithm
misc.php.title: PHP Serialization Parse
misc.zwc.pure_zwc: Pure zero-width string (copy to target text)
misc.zwc.verify_tip: Verify: paste into text box and use 'Zero-width decode' to recover
misc.base100.not_detected: No Base100 encoded Emoji characters detected
misc.coord.title: Coordinate Convert
misc.manchester.odd_bits: Manchester decode failed: bit count must be even
misc.manchester.no_binary: Manchester decode failed: no valid 0/1 sequence found
misc.manchester.decode_failed: Manchester decode failed: cannot parse as valid ASCII
misc.color.decode_failed: Color hex decode failed: cannot recognize color format
misc.dancing.decode_failed: Dancing men cipher decode failed: no number sequence found
misc.dancing.supported_formats:
Supported formats:
  Number sequence: '5 12 12 15' (1-26 maps to A-Z)
  Description: 'man_a man_b' or 'dance_e'
misc.freq.empty_text: Frequency analysis failed: text is empty
misc.freq.ic_high: Verdict: IC high, likely monoalphabetic cipher or natural language
misc.freq.ic_medium: Verdict: IC medium, likely polyalphabetic cipher (e.g. Vigenere)
misc.freq.ic_low: Verdict: IC low, likely polyalphabetic or random text
misc.freq.title: Text Frequency Analysis
misc.pixel.need_pillow: Pixel extract failed: need Pillow (pip install Pillow)
misc.pixel.open_failed: Pixel extract failed: cannot open image
misc.pixel.lsb_no_text: LSB extract: no printable text found
misc.pixel.r_no_text: R channel extract: no printable text found
misc.pixel.rgb_no_text: RGB extract: no printable text found
misc.keyboard.unknown_source: Layout convert failed: unknown source layout
misc.keyboard.unknown_target: Layout convert failed: unknown target layout
rev.high_entropy: High entropy - possibly packed or encrypted
rev.high_entropy_packer: High entropy - possibly packed, try detect_packer
rev.install_capstone: Install capstone for disassembly: pip install capstone
rev.install_pefile: Install pefile for detailed PE analysis: pip install pefile
rev.nx_hint_shellcode: Stack executable, can inject shellcode directly (shellcode_template)
rev.relro_full_hint: GOT read-only, need other methods to hijack control flow (__malloc_hook etc.)
rev.relro_partial_hint: GOT writable, can use GOT overwrite (got_overwrite_template)
rev.pie_hint_leak: Need to leak base address first, then calculate gadget offsets
rev.pie_hint_fixed: Fixed addresses, can use ROP gadgets directly (find_rop_gadgets <file>)
rev.canary_hint_leak: Need to leak or brute-force canary value
rev.canary_hint_none: No stack protection, can overwrite return address directly (generate_pattern + find_pattern_offset)
rev.security_weak: Very weak security, likely easy to exploit
rev.no_decompiler: No decompiler installed, using dis bytecode disassembly:
rev.no_lib_funcs: No known library functions detected (possibly stripped)
rev.not_pe_or_elf: Not a PE or ELF file
rev.not_dotnet_no_com: Not a .NET assembly (no COM Descriptor entry)
rev.not_dotnet_empty_com: Not a .NET assembly (COM Descriptor is empty)
rev.not_installed_builtin: not installed, using built-in pattern matching
rev.fallback_builtin: Falling back to built-in pattern matching
rev.no_xor_found: No XOR encrypted strings found (or insufficient key space)
rev.no_stack_string: No stack string construction pattern found
for.high_entropy: High entropy - possibly encrypted or compressed
for.very_low_entropy: Very low entropy - possibly mostly zero bytes
for.high_entropy_binwalk: High entropy - file may be encrypted or compressed, try binwalk_extract
for.zip_disguise_check: ZIP format - checking for disguised file
for.install_pillow_lsb: Install Pillow for LSB steganography analysis
for.zip_not_encrypted: This ZIP file is not encrypted
for.install_rarfile:
Need rarfile: pip install rarfile
Also need unrar command installed
for.rar_not_encrypted: This RAR file is not encrypted
for.no_encrypt_flag: No encryption flag found, may not be fake encryption
for.tip_hex_editor: Tip: Use hex editor for manual repair
for.install_pillow_trace: Install Pillow for mouse trace image
for.grayscale_no_split: Grayscale image, no channel split needed
for.not_audio: Not a known audio file format
for.use_audacity: Use Audacity or SonicVisualiser for other formats
for.audio_too_short: Audio data too short for spectrogram
for.spectrogram_tip: Tip: Look for text, patterns or unusual frequency bands in the spectrogram
for.use_audacity_detail: Use Audacity (Analyze > Spectrogram) for detailed spectrogram
for.wav_only_spectrogram: Currently only WAV format spectrogram is supported
for.bitplane_tip: Tip: Focus on R/G/B bit0 (LSB) planes, steganography info usually hides in low bits
for.dtmf_tip: Tip: Make sure the audio contains clear dial tones
for.not_office: Not a known Office document format
for.tip_volatility: Tip: Use Volatility for deeper memory analysis
for.ntfs_image: File may be an NTFS image/boot sector
for.no_ads_features: No obvious ADS features found in file content
for.no_extra_streams: dir /r found no extra data streams
for.not_windows: Not Windows, skipping system-level ADS detection
for.trying_raw_exif: Trying to extract basic EXIF info from raw data...
for.no_exif: No EXIF data found in image
for.no_exif_suspicious: Missing EXIF may indicate data was cleared (suspicious)
for.modified_later: Modified time later than capture time
for.mod_time_later: Modified time later than capture time
for.time_mismatch: Capture time vs digitized time mismatch
for.thumbnail_ratio_mismatch: Thumbnail aspect ratio mismatch with main image
for.gps_zero: GPS coordinates are (0, 0), possibly forged data
for.brand_model_mismatch: Camera brand may not match model
for.file_too_small: File too small, not a valid disk image
for.no_partition_table: No standard MBR/GPT partition table detected
for.boot_code_empty: Boot code area all zeros (no boot code)
for.boot_code_unknown: Boot code present (bootloader type not identified)
for.tip_fdisk: Use fdisk -l <image> for detailed partition info
for.tip_mmls: Use mmls <image> (Sleuth Kit) for partition layout
for.not_regf: Header is not 'regf', may not be a valid registry file
for.seq_mismatch: Sequence numbers mismatch, file may not have been properly closed
for.tip_reg_explorer: Use Registry Explorer (Eric Zimmerman) for in-depth analysis
for.tip_regripper: Use RegRipper for auto-extraction of key info
for.mtime_before_ctime: Modify time before create time (possibly tampered)
for.permission_denied: Permission denied, cannot list directory contents
for.trying_raw_dns: Trying to search DNS features from raw data...
for.no_dns_tunnel: No obvious DNS tunnel characteristics found
for.png_crc_ok: PNG CRC correct, no fix needed
for.crc_not_found: Could not find matching CRC size (range 1-2048)
web.need_requests: Need to install requests: pip install requests
web.post_data_saved: POST Data saved, can be passed to detection method's data parameter
web.vuln_confirmed_no_flag: Vulnerability CONFIRMED but flag not found in default paths
web.try_custom_path: Try manually: adjust the file path (e.g., /home/user/flag, /opt/flag.txt, /var/flag)
web.try_custom_cmd: Try manually: adjust the command (e.g., cat /home/user/flag, find / -name 'flag*')
web.try_custom_ssti: Try manually: adjust the RCE command in the SSTI payload to read flag from a custom path
web.try_custom_xxe: Try manually: adjust the XXE entity path (e.g., file:///home/user/flag, php://filter/...)
web.baseline_filtered: Responses matching baseline have been filtered out to reduce false positives
web.no_params_sqli: URL has no parameters, cannot test SQL injection
web.hint_provide_url: Hint: Please provide a URL with parameters, e.g. http://target.com/page?id=1
web.no_sqli_found: No obvious SQL injection point detected
web.no_params_xss: URL has no parameters, cannot test XSS
web.no_params_lfi: URL has no parameters, cannot test LFI
web.no_params_cmdi: URL has no parameters, cannot test command injection
web.no_params_ssrf: URL has no parameters, cannot test SSRF
web.no_params_ssti: URL has no parameters, cannot test SSTI
web.jwt.decode_header_failed: Cannot decode JWT Header, invalid format
web.jwt.none_note: Note: Target server must accept none algorithm for this to work
web.jwt.can_forge: You can now forge any payload with this key
web.no_xxe_found: No XXE vulnerability detected (tested POST XML)
web.no_params_redirect: URL has no parameters, cannot test Open Redirect
web.crlf.detected: CRLF injection detected! Response headers tampered
web.no_params_skip: No parameters found in URL, skipping parameter-level test
web.traversal.tip_waf: Some WAFs filter ../, try URL encoding or double encoding
web.traversal.tip_java: In Java apps, ..;/ can bypass some security checks
web.traversal.tip_filter: Use ....// to bypass simple ../ replacement filters
web.smuggling_note: Note: Detection only, no actual exploitation
web.smuggling.clte_possible: Possible CL-TE smuggling: probe request timed out
web.smuggling.length_diff: Large response length difference, possible smuggling risk
web.smuggling.tecl_possible: Possible TE-CL smuggling: probe request timed out
web.smuggling.clte_desc: Frontend uses Content-Length, backend uses Transfer-Encoding
web.smuggling.tecl_desc: Frontend uses Transfer-Encoding, backend uses Content-Length
web.smuggling.timeout_hint: Timeout or abnormal status may indicate server handles conflicting headers differently
web.smuggling.burp_hint: Recommend using Burp Suite HTTP Request Smuggler plugin for deeper testing
web.waf.no_fingerprint: No known WAF fingerprint detected from response headers
web.sqli_auto.no_flag_extracted: No flag extracted via blind injection
web.waf.tip_encoding: Try different encodings: URL encoding, double encoding, Unicode encoding
web.waf.tip_cloudflare: Try finding real IP (historical DNS, email headers, subdomains)
web.waf.no_waf_detected: No obvious WAF detected, target may not have WAF or uses an unknown WAF
web.swagger.title: Swagger/OpenAPI Detection
web.swagger.hint: Hint: Try manually checking non-standard paths or use dir_scan for extended discovery
web.swagger.no_paths: No API paths found in spec
web.swagger.tip_check_auth: Check if API endpoints require authentication - unauthenticated access is a common vulnerability
web.swagger.tip_test_sensitive: Test sensitive endpoints (admin/auth/user) for privilege escalation
web.swagger.tip_check_deprecated: Check for deprecated API versions that may lack security patches
web.sqli_auto.title: Automated SQL Injection Exploit Chain
web.sqli_auto.no_param: No query parameters found in URL
web.sqli_auto.hint_param: Hint: Provide a URL with parameters (e.g. http://target.com/page?id=1) or specify param name
web.sqli_auto.param_not_in_url: Parameter not found in URL query string
web.sqli_auto.bool_blind_confirmed: Boolean-based blind injection confirmed (true/false response differs)
web.sqli_auto.not_confirmed: Injection point not confirmed with current payloads
web.sqli_auto.hint_try_numeric: Try numeric injection without quotes (e.g. 1 OR 1=1)
web.sqli_auto.hint_try_double_quote: Try double quotes or other string delimiters
web.sqli_auto.step2_title: UNION Column Count Detection (ORDER BY binary search)
web.sqli_auto.trying_union_null: ORDER BY failed, trying UNION SELECT NULL method...
web.sqli_auto.manual_column_hint: Hint: Try manually with UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,... or use sqlmap
web.sqli_auto.no_echo: No echo positions found (data may not be reflected in response)
web.sqli_auto.blind_hint: Hint: Consider time-based or error-based extraction instead
web.sqli_auto.tip_tamper: If WAF blocks payloads, try encoding/tamper techniques
web.sqli_auto.tip_time_blind: For blind injection: use IF(condition,SLEEP(5),0) for time-based extraction
cry.auto_decode_fail: Auto decode failed: no readable content found
cry.text_too_short_key: Text too short, cannot reliably guess key length
cry.kasiski_test: Kasiski test (repeated segment distance factor frequency)
cry.ic_analysis: Index of Coincidence analysis (English expected IC ~ 0.0667)
cry.cannot_calc_d: Cannot calculate private key d (e and phi not coprime)
cry.small_e_fail: Small e attack failed, may need other methods
cry.common_modulus_fail: e1 and e2 not coprime, cannot perform common modulus attack
cry.wiener_fail: Wiener attack failed, d may not be small enough
cry.only_md5_sha1: Only supports MD5 (32-char hex) and SHA-1 (40-char hex)
cry.tip_hashpumpy: Tip: Use hashpumpy or manually set internal state to compute new hash
cry.need_try_each_keylen: Need to try padding for each possible key length
cry.not_coprime_26: is not coprime with 26, cannot decrypt
cry.affine_no_result: No decryption result containing common English words found
cry.but_cannot_calc_d: But cannot calculate private key d
cry.fermat_fail: Fermat factorization failed (p and q may differ too much)
cry.crt_fail: CRT failed: modular inverse does not exist
cry.hastad_fail: Hastad attack failed: root extraction imprecise
cry.data_too_short: Data too short for auto analysis (need at least 20 bytes)
cry.key_len_guess: Key length guess (Hamming distance, lower is more likely)
cry.hill_matrix_error: Key matrix must be 4 numbers (2x2) or 9 numbers (3x3), comma-separated
cry.hill_det_error: Key matrix determinant not coprime with 26:
cry.ecc_param_format: Param format: p,a,b,Gx,Gy or p,a,b,Gx,Gy,n,k (compute kG)
cry.dlp_param_format:
Param format: g,h,p (solve g^x = h mod p)
Example: 2,8,13 -> x=3 (since 2^3=8 mod 13)
cry.pohlig_param_format:
Param format: g,h,p,order
Especially effective when order factors into small primes
cry.text_too_short_sub: Text too short (need at least 50 letters) for reliable analysis
cry.sub_tip: Tip: Frequency analysis is only an initial estimate, usually need to manually swap letters based on context
cry.blowfish_key_len: Blowfish key length must be 4-56 bytes
cry.nihilist_input_error: Input should be space-separated two-digit numbers
cry.rsa_import_empty: Input is empty, please provide a file path or PEM text
cry.rsa_import_public_only: Public key only, no private key parameters
cry.rsa_import_manual_limit: Manual parsing: only n and e extracted, install PyCryptodome for full parsing
cry.hash_collision_fastcoll: Fastcoll tool (generate your own MD5 collision)
cry.hash_collision_shambles: SHA-1 is a Shambles — chosen-prefix collision (2020)
cry.hash_collision_crc32_space: CRC32 has only 2^32 possible values, collision search is fast
cry.hash_collision_crc32_demo: Demo: find a 4-byte value with the same CRC32 as b'AAAA'
cry.hash_collision_crc32_not_found: No collision found in search range
cry.hash_collision_crc32_custom_hint: Provide target CRC32 value to search for a matching 4-byte input
cry.pwd_is_common: WARNING: This is a common weak password!
cry.pwd_not_common: Not in common weak password list
cry.pwd_time_heat_death: longer than the age of the universe
for.sfs_no_flags: No flags found in scan results
for.fcp_no_files: No embedded files found with known header/footer signatures
hint.file_path: Enter file path or click 'Select File'
flag.generic_desc: This pattern auto-matches any XXX{...} format (2-20 char prefix + 4-200 char content), no need to add manually.
web.csrf.no_token: No CSRF token found (potential CSRF vulnerability)
web.upload.title: File Upload Bypass Helper
web.upload.re_render_tip1: Upload normal image, check if content is modified (re-rendered)
web.upload.re_render_tip2: If re-rendered: inject shellcode into non-compressed image areas (e.g., IDAT chunk for PNG)
rev.ipa.not_ipa: is not a valid IPA file
rev.ipa.ats_disabled: App Transport Security disabled, allows HTTP
rev.ipa.encrypted: Binary appears encrypted (needs decryption before analysis)
bc.state_after_call: State change AFTER external call — CEI violation
bc.tx_origin_auth: tx.origin used in authentication — use msg.sender instead
bc.send_check_var: .send() return value captured but verify usage
bc.abi_too_short: Data too short (need at least 4 bytes for selector)
bc.dynamic_slot: dynamic type — slot stores length or data
bc.flashloan_desc: Flash loan exploit templates for CTF / security research
bc.tip_trace: Trace the stack manually — write down each value after every opcode
bc.tip_jumpdest: JUMPI needs a JUMPDEST at the target offset — count bytes carefully
bc.tip_callvalue: CALLVALUE is msg.value — find what value satisfies the constraints
bc.tip_calldatasize: CALLDATASIZE is the total bytes of your input data
bc.tip_revert: Avoid paths that lead to REVERT — find the path to STOP
bc.tip_stack: Stack is LIFO — top of stack is the first operand for most opcodes
bc.pat_reentrancy_desc: External call before state update; re-enter via receive()/fallback()
bc.pat_overflow_desc: Arithmetic wraps around in Solidity < 0.8 or unchecked blocks
bc.pat_tx_origin_desc: tx.origin returns EOA; attacker deploys proxy to trick victim
bc.pat_selfdestruct_desc: selfdestruct forces ETH to any address; breaks balance checks
bc.pat_delegatecall_desc: delegatecall uses caller's storage; layout mismatch = overwrite
bc.pat_randomness_desc: On-chain data (timestamp, blockhash) is predictable by miners
bc.pat_frontrun_desc: Mempool transactions are visible; attacker can front-run
bc.pat_access_desc: Missing access control on sensitive functions
bc.pat_flashloan_desc: Borrow large amount to manipulate AMM price oracle in one tx
bc.pat_storage_desc: private variables are still readable via getStorageAt()
bc.pat_dos_desc: Unbounded loops or external call failures block execution
bc.pat_signature_desc: Signed message reused across transactions or chains
bc.patterns_footer: Tip: Always check the Solidity version, look for missing access control, and read storage slots directly.
web.backup.title: Backup File Detection
web.graphql.full_introspection_hint: Try full introspection query for details
web.host.reset_poison_hint: Try: intercept password reset email to check Host header
web.jsonp.no_sensitive: No sensitive data in JSONP response
